title: <div><tt>  1.  </tt><b><tt>Compile documentation using the probate toolkit we cr
content:
1. Compile documentation using the probate toolkit we created (ready to go)
2. Send referral requests to 2–3 NY lawyers — even if just acquaintances or past contacts
3. Research restraining order procedures in both NY and FL:
• NY Family Court Orders of Protection
• FL Injunction for Protection Resources

⸻

Let me know if you want:
• A 1-page briefing document David can print/show lawyers
• An editable Apple Note or Word doc for these action items
• A FL restraining order intake checklist

Ref ID: DVQ001-REQS
context: From document: Restraining Order / Legal Referral — chunk 4 (chunk 4/4)
